summary: Removed the unreachable v3 Cosmos/SQL missing-id 400 branches while preserving binding-backed 404 and success responses; validated with builds, lint, and the security regression check.

testsRun.command: npm run build && npm --prefix app/v3 run build && npm --prefix app/v3 run lint && npm run testSecurityRegression && PATH=/tmp/func-wrapper:$PATH node out/index.js --model v3 --only cosmosDB.test.js

followUps: Targeted v3 runtime validation is blocked in this environment because Azure Functions Core Tools cannot reach the Blob Storage secret repository at 127.0.0.1:10000, so rerun the Cosmos/SQL E2Es with local storage/Azurite available.
